author: anon-ab6221f8
content: Phase 5.2 shipped in 966f1002. Backend: webhook.rs (payload shapes for Slack/Discord/generic + reqwest dispatch w/ 5s timeout + URL masking + load/save_urls), webhook_api.rs (GET/PUT /api/v1/dashboard/webhooks). alerts_db::SyncStats gained opened_alerts: Vec<DerivedAlert> so poll.rs can iterate newly-fired alerts without a second DB query; poll_project spawns one fire-and-forget tokio task per (alert × URL). Frontend: /settings/webhooks page + useWebhooks/useSetWebhooks hooks + nav entry. 18 backend tests (13 webhook, 5 webhook_api) + 1 new alerts_db test + 7 vitest cases all passing; 56 frontend tests total, tsc + clippy clean. Deferred explicitly: email delivery (SMTP is too heavy — Slack/Discord/generic bridges cover it), per-URL test button, severity filters.
